message:
stage 1 phase G: browser perf bench vs transformers.js WebGPU

Adds a playwright bench that loads both PrivacyFilter backends in one
Chromium page and measures warm-forward medians across T=8/25/61:

- transformers.js (default): downloads ONNX from HF Hub, auto-selects
  WebGPU when available (confirmed enabled via `--enable-unsafe-webgpu`
  + `--use-angle=metal` in playwright.config.ts).
- WasmBackend: loads the full 944 MB blob via a gitignored symlink
  to `/tmp/pii-wasm-e2e/pii-weights-full.bin` (produced by
  gen-full-parity-fixture.py).

Not a CI test — the full blob is not committed. Invoke locally via
`bun x playwright test tests/browser/bench.spec.ts`.
